name: RealDESED: A Real-World Domestic Sound Event Detection Benchmark
summary: arXiv:2607.16736v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents RealDESED, a real-world domestic sound event detection (SED) benchmark comprising 5,710 audio recordings collected by 652 parti...
description: arXiv:2607.16736v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper presents RealDESED, a real-world domestic sound event detection (SED) benchmark comprising 5,710 audio recordings collected by 652 participants in their homes. Each recording is between 15 and 35 seconds long and contains temporally precise annotations for 15 common domestic sound classes. In contrast to existing SED datasets, which t...
author: Florian Schmid, Paul Primus, Alexander Fichtinger, Tara Jadidi, Tobias Morocutti, Gerhard Widmer
